a.xlink:title: Returns true if the trajectory generator is busy.
Generates a trajectory and blocks until it is done.
Returns true if the trajectory generator is done.
Get the flag for whether to generate trajectories asynchronously with a one time step delay.
Get the period for polling the trajectory generator for new trajectories.
Get updated target reference. Sets the has_failed flag if the target is not visible.
Resets the client with the current state.
Combined drone awareness handler, accessible to derived classes through the protected method.
Cancels the trajectory generation if it is active.
